message:
fix(output): add trailing newlines to Rich mode status helpers and add print_line

The success(), info(), and warning() helpers in Rich mode were missing
trailing newlines, causing subsequent output to concatenate on the same
line. Added explicit \n to each, and introduced a new print_line()
method for callers that need a guaranteed line-oriented print (replacing
bare ctx.print() calls that assumed newline behavior).

Includes a regression test that verifies trailing newlines in captured
Rich mode output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
